title: EMG Pathology PASS: QA orbit features predict pathology beyond RMS

data_source._note: n_windows corrected 2026-07-05 audit: was 1203 (pre-alignment window count, before the rolling-QA-feature lookback truncation), should be 1183 (the actual number of windows the model was fit on, per 53_emg_preregistered_results.json). delta_r2/p_value/surrogates below were always computed on the correct 1183-window aligned data -- only this metadata field was stale.

delta_r2._note: p_value corrected 2026-07-05 audit: was a stale 1e-7 placeholder, ~125 orders of magnitude off from the real script's computed p_qa_add=1.7270265495511064e-132 in 53_emg_preregistered_results.json. Validator only checks p_value<0.05 (a threshold, not exact match) so this never affected PASS/FAIL, but the declared number was wrong.
